task_updates.executor_notes: Replaced the dict/getattr-based dispatch in `_handle_pending_recipient_message` with explicit branching at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:1113-1125`. The method now does `classification, clarification_reply = await self._classify_confirmation(content)`, routes `positive` to `_handle_test_receipt_positive`, routes `negative` to `_handle_test_receipt_negative`, and routes the remaining path to `_handle_test_receipt_ambiguous(..., clarification_reply=clarification_reply)`. Added the minimal kw-only `clarification_reply: Optional[str] = None` parameter to `_handle_test_receipt_ambiguous` at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:617-624` so the forwarded kwarg is accepted before T5 starts using it; handler behavior is otherwise unchanged in this batch. Verification: `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py --tb=no -q --no-header` passed; `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with `201 passed, 4 warnings`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. The dict/getattr dispatch was removed. `_handle_pending_recipient_message` now unpacks `(classification, clarification_reply)` from `await self._classify_confirmation(content)` at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:1113-1114`, routes positive and negative via explicit `if/elif`, and forwards `clarification_reply` only to `_handle_test_receipt_ambiguous(..., clarification_reply=clarification_reply)` at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:1120-1124`.
